title: 52 Iranian ships breach US blockade of Iranian ports in 72 hours

contents:
# 52 Iranian ships breach US blockade of Iranian ports in 72 hours

## Overview
Dozens of Iranian vessels slipped through America's blockade of Iranian ports. Iran's Fars News Agency reported 52 ships breached it in just three days.[2]

## Details
The breach raises questions about the US pressure campaign's effectiveness against Tehran. Ships evaded the so-called “world-class” blockade amid a temporary truce. Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps announced partial closure of the Strait of Hormuz. The closure targets vessels linked to the US, Israel, and allies. This occurred during discussions between the warring nations.[2]

**Location**: Persian Gulf, Iran

## Source Context
The information comes from Twitter @cnni, which covers CNN International world breaking news conflicts. The reporting matches their typical area of focus.

## Significance
This development adds to the ongoing pattern of activity tracked through this source. Analysts following CNN International world breaking news conflicts will likely watch for follow-up reporting.
